---
title: "Contact"
---

## Maintainer

- **Neeraj Dhanraj Bokde** (Maintainer)
- Email: [neerajdhanraj@gmail.com](mailto:neerajdhanraj@gmail.com)

## Support

For bug reports and feature requests:

- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/issues

## Links

- CRAN: https://cran.r-project.org/package=VedicDateTime
- GitHub: https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime
- Paper: https://doi.org/10.1007/s11042-023-16553-w
